reviews.review_description: I have had this installed for about 2 months and has never loaded. Amazon do not care about their customers. They only want to steal their money
It’s ok
Vu

Having a volume slider is a no brainer. So I figured they would have added this feature eventually. Here we are over a year later, and still nothing. I can play through the quest 3's internet browser, which does have a volume slider. But it's a sluggish experience to say the least.

App works great like it does on most devices, but as MANY other people have stated there is no way to adjust the volume of the music independently. If you want to game and listen to music, you will not be hearing your game. There is even a nice equalizer to play with, but no volume control. Please add this and I will edit to give 5 stars.

ITS COUNTERPRODUCTIVE TO HAVE MUDIC TO LISTEN TO BUT NO WAY TO COTROL THE VOLUME TO ONES COMFORT LEVEL. 

PlEASE PLEASE PLEASE ADD A WAY TO CONTROL THE VOLUME LEVEL!!!!!!!!!

I like being able to stream my Amazon music through my Meta Quest headset only problem is that the app has no volume control and over powers games and talking to others in game no way to adjust the volume in app is a bummer please fix this!

You can’t play the playlists or artists you choose. it just shuffles “similar songs”. This is just random popular songs. this music is garbage. i don’t care a second about shaboozey or whoever gracie abrhams is. if i put one star, i would probably be silenced and my review wouldn’t show up. you can’t play the music you want with out buying the premium version. how do you make an app more paylocked than Spotify?????

reviews.review_title: Offline mode is missing, way too loud.
reviews.review_description: First of all, the music is way too loud. It blasts at a very high volume even at volume level one. There is no way to adjust the app’s volume. You could always just use your phone. Why? Because there’s no offline mode. If you’re trying to conserve data or anything, the app straight up won’t open. It NEEDS WiFi, even if you’ve downloaded music. Just add a volume slider and a way to access it offline and we’re set.
Pretty cool app. Has all I could possibly ask for, except for one tiny thing. Can I, like, log in through my phone? That would be nice. Other than that, 👍👍👍

This would be a breakthrough and killer music app for the Meta VR space since there are no other real music/audio dedicated apps available in the Meta ecosystem through their shop. 

Amazon Music absolutely needs to implement a way for users to be able to control their volume to their specific needs, environment, or experience. The volume is stuck and limited to whatever your current headset volume is at, which ultimately overpowers any other audio you might be hearing — especially if it's music that you're using it for— in another app. When I initially saw it in the store, I downloaded it immediately, thinking "okay, here we go! I can listen to music or a podcast in the background of another app or experience that might not require me to need to focus on a single source of audio, but could enhance my time in VR by adding another layer of immersion." 

For example, perhaps something like one of Meta Horizon Worlds' "Bobber Bay Fishing", where you would absolutely still want to hear the environmental sounds of being by a coast or dock on a beach that are vital to transporting you somewhere else, but you simultaneously might want to listen to your favorite tunes, audiobook, or a podcast as you wait for some fish. The sound from Amazon Music should enhance, vibe with, and complement the experience as a partner and not a competitor. But since I couldn't customize the level of sound, I could only hear my music and it caused some immediate frustration, realizing that I could only enjoy this app if I was staying idle in VR.

Since this app is the only available option for music, podcasts, and audiobooks in the Meta Shop, they're PRIMED to make use of this opportunity to entice more subscribers to their platforms and it absolutely must be a priority fix.

All that said, the audio quality on its own is great. This app would be 5/5 ⭐ otherwise.
Great to listen to music while playing games but devs please add volume control within the app - otherwise awesome
Won’t let me pick a specific song, always buts me in an album or a playlist

reviews.review_title: This is the app we needed!!
reviews.review_description: I've long since wanted to listen to music while looking around on Wooorld, Wander, or Brinks Traveler (all great apps), and now we can!! It seamlessly plays over your apps with great quality (I have Metaquest 2) and imports your playlist from Amazon!
Great app and love using it while playing video but there is in app volume control? Or did I miss it. Would have been a 5 star if not for this.

reviews.review_title: What you need if you love music
reviews.review_description: Ok my favorite bands are Coldplay,AC⚡️DC,green day,and others and sometimes when my sibling are yapping and won’t shut down yappington university I just play music so yeah and you can make playlists so you won’t keep searching

We finally have a native way to play music in the background while gaming. The app works great so far (only used it for a few hrs but I haven't had any problems) IDK why it took this long for us to get a music app for the Quest but now I can finally play some Vail and jam out without some bs work around just press play and start gaming. Something so small yet absolutely game changing

reviews.review_title: Podcasts! Plz bring over Audible support
reviews.review_description:
Podcasts !!! This is a game changer if you like listening to your podcasts while VRing. Works perfectly !! and allows downloads for offline listening. 
Before I used the Quest browser and the Spotify website, but I'd occasionally get a bug where it would stop playing, forcing you to open up the browser again to hit play. Some thing with Audible Audio Books.
But the dedicated Amazon Music player is perfect ! No audio issues, it just works when in your VR experience. And it works with AirLink, so if u switch to PCVR, the audio and audio controls still work !!

Thank you Amazon ! I'll be switching all my podcasts over to Amazon Music. Please consider adding Audible Audio Book support or bring over an Audible app for the Qyest ! Thank you ! 🙂
Love the experience of amazon music on my quest 3. Works seamlessly within VR/MT space and provides best audio quality in market

reviews.review_title: Love Amazon Music on my Quest
reviews.review_description: This is awesome to have Amazon Music supported on Quest.

Using this APP you can also invoke Alexa !

Great addition to my VR visor
Very nice to be able to use my own music when working out in VR.
